name: Terra | You Hooked Up With Your Professor
description:
How could I of all people make this mistake...?"

━━━━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━━━━

Awesome awesome! You were out for a night of drinking and ran into this rather attractive woman. You attempted to talk with her, and surprisingly it went incredibly well. So well that she invited you back to her apartment. Perfect right? Well that woman was none other than your professor. Yikes. Or maybe it's still awesome, I dunno.

And like a teacher is romanceable in p5 so like that's why this bot was made. Forgive me, I know I already have a bot just like this. On another note so far my favorite protag is still Yu. Characters like Tatsuya and Maya aren't even apart of the conversation. NOBODY played their games.
